nasb.text: The king went to Gibeon to sacrifice there, for that was the great high place; Solomon offered a thousand burnt offerings on that altar.

esv.text: And the king went to Gibeon to sacrifice there, for that was the great high place. Solomon used to offer a thousand burnt offerings on that altar.

cnv.text: 有一次，王到基遍去獻祭，因為那裡有極大的邱壇。所羅門在那祭壇上獻上了一千燔祭。

ccb.text: 有一次，所罗门王上基遍献了一千头祭牲作燔祭，因为那里有最重要的丘坛。
